label: Admin / Plant Library
items: Plant Library — rows that fail verification no longer churn forever. After three failed attempts a row default-passes to valid = true with the last error recorded, so the cron stops re-processing the same broken plant every night.
Plant Library — postgres update errors are now caught and surfaced. The previous silent failure mode (AI returning a string where a number was expected) is what was leaving rows stuck.
Plant Library — new "Stuck verifications" panel on the admin dashboard shows every row the verifier has hit at least one error on, with the actual error message and current status.
